title: Overgrown's Origins: Voidwalker
description: Unleash the mystical powers of the Voidwalker, charged with Void Energy! This datapack empowers you to cultivate and control this formidable force. Become a conduit for enigmatic energies and transform your Minecraft realm!
body:
## 🌑 **Voidwalker: Masters of Void Energy!** 🌑

Step into the shadows and master the arcane energies of the Void with the Voidwalker Origin! This datapack immerses you in the role of a Voidwalker, a unique human subspecies infused with the dark and powerful Void Energy. Manipulate the very fabric of reality and explore Minecraft like never before!

Building upon the legacy of the original Voidwalker Origin, which was brilliantly coded by Paymon The Voidwalker. With permission from them, I've reworked and updated the original Origin and will be maintaining it until further notice.

### 🎉 **Featured by:** 🎉

- 🎞️ [Krzair](https://www.youtube.com/@KrzairMC) on [YouTube](https://youtu.be/cPppMiqA0Rw?si=3tjVsM1qY0cHp5ji)
- 🔮 [Paymon The Voidwalker](https://youtube.com/@TheGamingXenoMorph?si=QsdbReUoDblimjFj) on [YouTube](https://youtu.be/-o7CP-_NXzY?si=z4HBHdVd61lcW3iu)

### 🌌 **What Makes the Voidwalker Origin Enigmatic?** 🌌
- **Void Energy**: Imbue your body with the essence of the void, unlocking a plethora of potent abilities!
- **Blink**: Instantly teleport short distances, slipping through cracks in space-time!
- **Chaotic Accelerant**: Increase your power drastically when overcharged, but beware the increased damage you take!

### 🌠 **Navigate a Realm Filled with Power and Peril!** 🌠
- **Entropic Bloom**: Target and detonate explosive void energy at any point within your sight!
- **Gravity Manipulation**: Warp gravity to create crushing singularities, altering battlefield dynamics!
- **Levitation**: Rise above the ground, defying gravity with ease and agility!

### 🌀 **Discover the Voidwalker Difference!** 🌀
- **Field Forces**: Rely on enhanced dodging instead of shields, focusing more on agility!
- **Path of the Void**: Tougher skin increases your defense, offset by a reduced life force.
- **Active Ability Passives**: Unique secondary effects like temporary blindness from Blink or a mysterious purple glow when using Chaotic Accelerant enhance your tactical options!

### ⚫ **Why Choose the Voidwalker Origin?** ⚫
- The Voidwalker Origin is not just another datapack; it's an invitation to control mysterious energies and reshape your Minecraft experience. Embrace your destiny as a Voidwalker, where power and mystery intertwine in every aspect of gameplay!

### 🌑 **Join the Voidwalker Adventure!** 🌑
- Dive into the enigmatic world of Minecraft with the Voidwalker Origin! Master unique abilities, manipulate mysterious energies, and command the powers of the void. Download now and join the community exploring arcane mysteries!
